entries.title: Session quests for coins
entries.detail: Every run now rolls 4 objectives from a pool of 40+ (kills, bosses, combos, absorbs, survive time, power, level, relics, evolutions, gates, ultimates, chests). Track them live in the HUD with progress bars; completing one pays out coins instantly with a toast.

entries.title: Blades now cut heroes they overlap
entries.detail: Your spinning ring used to pass through rival & AI heroes standing among the outer blades without hitting them. Combat reach now matches the ring's true drawn extent (all concentric rings), so any hero your blades visibly cover is actually sliced — with the clash spark on the target.

entries.title: Boss archetypes + multi-phase fights
entries.detail: Bosses now have unique mechanics by type — Summoner (add bursts), Teleporter (blinks next to you), Charger (telegraphed rush), Bomber (extra barrages), Shielder (a bubble that soaks most damage). Below half HP a boss enters Phase 2: a dramatic transition, then faster attacks, faster mechanics, and quicker movement.

entries.title: Map hazards
entries.detail: Maps now have environmental hazards you must play around: lava and toxic pools drain your HP, quicksand and toxic mud slow you, ice makes you slide (faster, harder to stop), and void whirlpools drag you toward their center. Each hazardous map scatters its own themed zones.

entries.title: Prestige
entries.detail: Once you've bought enough shop upgrades you can Prestige: reset your coins and all upgrades for permanent Prestige Stars. Each star is +5% base damage AND +5% coins forever, and stars never reset. Manage it from the Shop; your star count shows on the menu.

entries.title: Grand hero rarity-up spectacle
entries.detail: Hero evolution is now more deliberate (no blur), and crossing into a new rarity tier plays a unique, escalating spectacle — blue for Rare, violet for Epic, gold for Legendary, crimson for Mythic, prismatic for Divine — with tier-colored rings, light beams, a full-screen banner, and a bigger flash/shake the higher you go.

entries.title: Upgrade evolutions
entries.detail: Level an elemental upgrade to 5 and it EVOLVES into an auto-casting skill: Ignite → Inferno (meteor storm), Frostbite → Absolute Chill (blizzard), Venom → Plague (toxic cloud). Evolved elements periodically strike on their own, shown by an icon in the HUD.

entries.title: Ultimates now have real, visible effects
entries.detail: Every Divine ultimate got a bespoke effect you can actually see: falling meteors, forked lightning, a blizzard of snow, radiant light pillars, ground-shattering quakes with cracks, a lingering toxic virus cloud, black-hole vortices, and more — no more flat warning rings.

entries.title: Boss warnings + bosses hunt NPCs
entries.detail: A boss now announces itself with a pulsing 'Boss Incoming' banner and telegraph rings where it lands — and it butchers any AI hero that strays into its reach.

entries.title: Map intro banner + dynamic music
entries.detail: Each run now announces the map name as it begins (one of 12), and the music intensifies — faster tempo and driving layers — when a boss appears or Boss Rush starts.

entries.title: Relics — passive run modifiers
entries.detail: Chests can now drop one of 10 unique relics (Iron Blades, Berserker's Rage, Aegis, Midas Touch, Ember Heart, and more). They stack with your upgrades, so every run builds differently. Owned relics show in the HUD.

entries.title: Changelog page
entries.detail: This page! A dated timeline of every update to Blade Rush, reachable from the menu.

entries.title: Faster mid-game leveling
entries.detail: XP per kill now scales with the kill's value and the level curve is gentler (×1.55). Lvl 6→7 dropped from ~567 kills to ~80, so progression never flat-lines.

entries.title: 4 new maps: Sakura, Cavern, Necropolis, Abyss
entries.detail: Sakura Garden, Crystal Cavern, Necropolis, and Abyssal Depths — each with a unique ground tile, props, themed obstacles, and ambient particles. The world now rolls one of 12 maps.

entries.title: 3 new maps + themed obstacles
entries.detail: Sunken Marsh, Golden Savanna, and Celestial Ruins. Obstacles are now themed per map (gnarled tree, giant mushroom, cactus, ice spire, molten boulder, rune monolith).

entries.title: Redrawn Divine champions
entries.detail: Plague Lord, Abyssal Tyrant, Prism Archon, and Lunar Sovereign rebuilt on the armored god-figure base so they match the grandeur of the other Divine heroes.

entries.title: Skill cooldowns reset on hero change
entries.detail: Evolving or transforming your hero instantly refreshes every skill — including a freshly-unlocked Divine ultimate — so you can use it right away.

entries.title: Revamped main menu
entries.detail: A command-console layout: eyebrow + title lockup, an icon-card mode picker, a prominent PLAY button, and a player stats rail (Playing as / Best / Coins).

entries.title: Unlock heroes with coins
entries.detail: Locked heroes in the Codex show a coin price and can be unlocked directly — the practical way to play as high-tier and Divine champions.

entries.title: Game modes
entries.detail: Pick a mode on the menu: Normal, Endless (no Boss Rush), Boss Rush from the start, or Time Attack (5-minute score chase with a HUD countdown).

entries.title: Audio & motion settings
entries.detail: Independent SFX volume slider and a Screen Shake toggle, with all audio preferences persisted between sessions.

entries.title: Cinematic ultimates & intense Boss Rush
entries.detail: Divine ultimates trigger an anime-style cut-in banner with a bespoke sound per ultimate, and Boss Rush adds a pulsing crimson vignette.

entries.title: 20 Divine heroes
entries.detail: Ten more Divine champions (Verdant Titan, Tide Emperor, Solar Deity, and more), each with a totally unique look and a one-of-a-kind ultimate.

entries.title: How-to-Play guide
entries.detail: A new illustrated guide page walks through the core loop, power, leveling, hero evolution, skills, bosses, and Boss Rush as flowcharts.

entries.title: Boss Rush endgame
entries.detail: Reach Lvl 10 (in Normal) and the horde gives way to waves of bosses — one lead boss plus escorts, growing in count and toughness.

entries.title: Choose your hero before a run
entries.detail: Pick any discovered hero in the Codex to start as it; the menu shows who you'll play as, or Auto to evolve with your score.

entries.title: Bigger world + obstacles
entries.detail: The arena grew to 4800×4800 and now has solid boulders, pillars, crystals, and stumps to navigate around.

entries.title: Signature weapon effects
entries.detail: Every weapon carries a distinct on-hit effect — ignite, frostbite, venom, chain lightning, lifesteal, execute, and more.

entries.title: Live ranking + run summary
entries.detail: An .io-style live leaderboard shows your rank, and each run ends with a summary of kills, bosses, best combo, and unlocked achievements.

entries.title: 500 monster variations
entries.detail: A roster of 500 procedurally-built monsters across 5 tiers — fiercer and bigger as you grow stronger.

entries.title: AI survivor NPCs
entries.detail: Ten AI heroes roam the world with their own sword rings — they fight the horde, duel each other and you, and can be absorbed for power.

entries.title: The Codex
entries.detail: A scrollable gallery of every hero, rival, monster, boss, and weapon — units are discovered by encountering or defeating them.

entries.title: Hero evolution & rarity
entries.detail: Your hero visibly transforms as your score climbs, from a humble footman up through six rarity tiers to a bespoke Divine champion.

entries.title: Meta shop & elemental builds
entries.detail: Spend coins on permanent upgrades between runs, and pick elemental status effects (burn / frost / venom) during a run.

entries.title: Controls, audio & pause
entries.detail: Added a floating touch joystick, procedural background music, and a Pause + Settings overlay.
